paragraphs: I am an aspiring deep learning researcher with interests in Computer Vision, Medical Imaging, and Multi-Object Tracking. My work focuses on understanding how learning-based systems behave in practice through careful experimentation, benchmarking, and analysis.

I enjoy studying the mathematical intuition behind machine learning algorithms and building a strong foundation before applying them to real-world problems. My research experiences have spanned remote sensing, medical image analysis, and traffic surveillance, where I have worked on developing, evaluating, and improving deep learning systems.
Beyond research, I enjoy exploring topics in mathematics and quantum computing, with a particular interest in understanding the principles that drive modern intelligent systems.
